# Protik Roychowdhury — protik.info

> VP Product at Intellect | Three-time founder | ICF-certified coach | Academic researcher

## About

Protik Roychowdhury is VP Product at Intellect, a regulated enterprise health platform serving 4M+ users across APAC, ANZ, China, and Latam. He leads a 20+ person product, design, content, localisation, and AI team. He drove enterprise revenue to $20M ARR by leading the pivot from consumer app to B2B2C care ecosystem, shipped GenAI features (triage, session prep, treatment plans), and co-authored 3 academic papers on AI in mental health.

Before Intellect, Protik was Principal PM for Growth, Engagement & Loyalty (GEL) at Grab ($3.8B+ revenue superapp), where he increased ARPU by 2% via personalisation and gamification, boosted onboarding success by 15pp, built engagement tools unlocking $2.5M in ad revenue, and delivered $4.5M in cost savings on the Driver Rentals product for 30K+ vehicles. He held product leadership roles at Ola (India's largest ride-hailing platform — reduced revenue leakage by INR 9.7M, improved driver earnings by 12%), Fabelio (Indonesia e-commerce — increased showroom conversions by 18pp, first senior product hire), and Exotel (India's leading cloud telephony platform).

Protik is a three-time founder: Croak.it! (voice-based social platform, 1M recordings, 200K downloads, acquired by Exotel), Bhalu.com (hyperlocal task marketplace — post odd jobs, anyone could fulfil them; 2009-2011, built in college), and Athlete Diaries / The Players' Diary (India's version of The Players' Tribune).

He is an IIT Kharagpur alumnus (B.Tech Hons, Metallurgical & Materials Engineering, GPA 8.19) and an ICF-certified career coach working with product managers, founders, and senior leaders. Also a Certified Mental Health First Aider (MHFA).

## Authority Pillars

Protik's expertise spans five core authority pillars:

1. **AI Product Strategy** — Shipping GenAI features in regulated industries, AI personalisation at scale, human-AI balance
2. **Trust & High-Stakes Product Design** — Designing for trust in mental health, healthcare, and financial products where failure has real consequences
3. **Product Leadership & Judgement** — Scaling product orgs, developing product intuition, the founder-to-operator journey
4. **Regulated Tech & Digital Health** — Digital therapeutics, AI in mental health, clinical product design, provider quality frameworks, building compliant products in regulated industries
5. **Marketplace & Platform Scaling** — Two-sided marketplace design, supply-demand optimisation, payments infrastructure, cross-border scaling

## Areas of Expertise

- AI Product Management & GenAI Feature Shipping
- Marketplace Design & Supply-Demand Optimisation (Grab, Ola, Fabelio)
- Growth, Engagement & Loyalty (GEL) — Consumer Lifecycle
- Personalisation, Experimentation & A/B Testing at Scale
- Mental Health Technology & Digital Therapeutics
- Platform Products & E-commerce
- Product-Led Growth & Conversion Optimisation
- Multi-Market Operating Model Design (APAC, ANZ, China, EMEA, Latam)
- Conversational AI & LLMs
- Human-Centred Design & Behavioural Science
- Team Building & Scaling (3→20+ person product orgs)
- Platform Governance, Build/Buy & Vendor Strategy
- Executive Coaching (ICF certified) & Portfolio-Level Product Leadership
- Startup Founding & Exits (Croak.it! acquired by Exotel)
- Cross-Border Product Localisation (20+ languages, APAC markets)
- Regulated Technology (Health, Finance)
- Data-Driven OKR Leadership & Pod Structures
- B2B2C Business Model & Enterprise Revenue

## Academic Publications

- "The RISE Protocol: A Proposed Framework to Reduce Time-to-Intervention in AI-Driven Mental Health Risk Detection" — JMIR Preprints, Aug 2025. Sole author. DOI: 10.2196/preprints.82983
- "The Provider GPA: A Composite Framework for Evaluating Digital Therapist Quality Through Engagement, Reliability, and Client Feedback" — medRxiv, Sep 2025. Co-authored with Oliver Sündermann. DOI: 10.1101/2025.09.01.25334495
- "Bias in Large Language Models for Mental Health: Evidence from Vignette-Based Evaluation Across Nine Models" — PsyArXiv, Sep 2025. Co-authored with Lerh, Fang, Sündermann, Sinha & Chauhan. DOI: 10.31234/osf.io/ykn2c

## Speaking Topics

Protik speaks at conferences, leadership summits, and product communities on six signature topics:

1. From Roadmaps to Judgement: What Product Leaders Need in the AI Era
2. Building AI Products People Can Trust
3. Why UX Is Care: Lessons from Mental Health Product Design
4. Scaling Product Teams Without Killing Product Judgement
5. AI, Personalisation, and the Future of Mental Health Support
6. What High-Stakes Products Can Teach Us About Trust

## Ideas (On-Site Articles)

- "Payments at Scale: What I Learned Leading Fintech Products at Grab" — May 2026. Lessons from leading GEL and Driver Rentals at Grab: payments infrastructure, engagement monetisation, $4.5M cost savings, multi-market fintech. https://protik.info/ideas/payments-at-scale-lessons-from-grab
- "Marketplace Lessons from Ola: Supply-Demand, Fraud, and Driver Economics" — May 2026. Two-sided marketplace design at India's largest ride-hailing platform: fraud prevention (INR 9.7M/month saved), driver incentive redesign (+12% earnings), dynamic pricing, India-scale complexity. https://protik.info/ideas/marketplace-lessons-from-ola

- "The Great Unbundling of Product Management: Why 2026 Belongs to the Impact Architect" — Jan 2026, 3 min. Originally on Medium. https://protik.info/ideas/the-great-unbundling-of-product-management
- "The ROI of Care: Investing in Mental Health as Infrastructure for Performance" — May 2025, 4 min. Originally on Medium. https://protik.info/ideas/the-roi-of-care
- "What Humans Still Do Best, And Why That Should Shape the Future of AI in Mental Health" — May 2025, 4 min. Originally on Medium. https://protik.info/ideas/what-humans-still-do-best
- "Designing for Trust in Mental Health Apps: Why UX Is Care" — May 2025, 5 min. Originally on Medium. https://protik.info/ideas/designing-for-trust-in-mental-health-apps
- "When AI Becomes an Echo Chamber: The Ethical Risk to Mental Health" — May 2025, 4 min. Originally on Medium. https://protik.info/ideas/when-ai-becomes-an-echo-chamber
- "How AI is Personalising Mental Health Support at Scale" — Apr 2025, 4 min. Originally on Medium. https://protik.info/ideas/how-ai-is-personalising-mental-health-support
